zh.lifeSummary: Robert Pitfold是John Pytfolde和Mary Amelia Martin的兒子，於1520年出生在英國英格蘭多瑟特阿林頓。他於1567年與Joan在英國英格蘭多瑟特維姆斯結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1586年在英國英格蘭多瑟特特其享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Robert Pitfold是John Pytfolde和Mary Amelia Martin的儿子，于1520年出生在英国英格兰多瑟特阿林頓。他于1567年与Joan在英国英格兰多瑟特維姆斯结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1586年在英国英格兰多瑟特特其享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: Pitfold
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from a lost or unidentified place in Sussex named with Old English fald ‘fold, enclosure’ as the final element, perhaps to be identified with Pilfolds in Horsham (Sussex).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: Robert Pitfold was born in 1520, in Allington, Dorset, England, United Kingdom as the son of John Pytfolde and Mary Amelia Martin. He married Joan in 1567, in Weymouth, Dorset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 2 daughters. He died about 1586, in Whitechurch, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Robert Pitfold est né en 1520, à Allington, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de John Pytfolde et Mary Amelia Martin. Il a épousé Joan en 1567, à Weymouth, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 1586, à Whitechurch, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Robert Pitfold wurde 1520 in Allington, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von John Pytfolde und Mary Amelia Martin geboren. Er hat 1567 in Weymouth, Dorset, England, United Kingdom Joan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1586 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Whitechurch, Dorset, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Robert Pitfold è nato il nel 1520 nel Allington, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di John Pytfolde e Mary Amelia Martin. Lui sposato Joan nel 1567, nel Weymouth, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1586, nel Whitechurch, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Pitfoldは1520年にイギリスイギリスドールセトアリントンでJohn PytfoldeとMary Amelia Martinの息子として生まれた。1567年にイギリスイギリスドールセトウエイモウスでJoanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1586年にイギリスイギリスドールセトウィテチャーチで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Pitfold(은)는 1520년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 앨링턴에서 John Pytfolde(와)과 Mary Amelia Martin의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1567년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 w이모우스에서 Joan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1586년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 휘테c후르치에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Robert Pitfold nasceu em 1520, em Allington, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de John Pytfolde e Mary Amelia Martin. Ele casou-se com Joan em 1567, em Weymouth, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1586, em Whitechurch, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Robert Pitfold родился в 1520 г. в местности аллингтон, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали John Pytfolde и Mary Amelia Martin. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan в 1567 г. в местности вимоут, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер около 1586 г. в местности уитечурч, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Robert Pitfold nació en 1520, en Allington, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de John Pytfolde y Mary Amelia Martin. Se casó con Joan en 1567, en Weymouth, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1586, en Whitechurch, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 67 años.
